entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – SAP Fiori Security Design Fundamentals
entry.content:
Hi @Jocelyn_Dart 

I've heard from other sources within SAP that the business roles are not to be used in production environments. Is this correct from your POV? I couldn't find anything about this in your blog. To my understanding the new best practice recommendation is to create custom roles. For production use, but the business role templates can be used in development and test environments.

Kr Lisa

entry.title: Re: Welcome to Career Corner
entry.content:
Dear all,

I work for an IT recruitment agency as a strategic consultant and Scrum Master. At the same time, I am studying Computer Science B.Sc. Since the S/4HANA transformation is a recurring topic at our customers, I have become aware of the SAP world and am now looking for opportunities to become an SAP Consultant and/or SAP Developer. I am already very interested in ABAP. As I also spent 15 years in logistics management, I want to focus on supply chain solutions and technologies such as SAP (E)WM.

How can I design my learning path for this?

entry.title: Re: Abap : Loop at bapi function module not working
entry.content: How many entries do you se in PO_NO (in debugger)?

entry.title: TEMU discount code{aaf63818} or{act200019} -> (June, july- 2024)
entry.content:
Currently, TEMU discount code {aaf63818} or{act200019} ◦ June 2024. This code can be used by both new and existing users to get a $100 discount on their purchase. Don't forget to apply the code at checkout to receive the discount.

For businesses operating in Brazil, navigating the complexities of tax regulations can be a challenge. A crucial aspect of this is complying with electronic invoicing, mandated by the Nota Fiscal Eletronica (NF-e) system. This article explores SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica, a solution designed to simplify NF-e compliance for SAP users.

Understanding NF-e
NF-e refers to the electronic invoice format used in Brazil for transactions involving goods. It eliminates paper invoices, promoting tax efficiency and streamlining the invoicing process. Companies must generate NF-e in a specific XML format, containing details like buyer and seller information, product specifics, and tax data.

SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica: A Helping Hand
SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica is a software solution offered by SAP that aids businesses in complying with NF-e regulations. It integrates seamlessly with existing SAP systems, automating manual tasks and ensuring accurate invoice generation.

Key Benefits of SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica
Enhanced Compliance: The solution automates NF-e generation in the mandated XML format, minimizing errors and ensuring compliance with Brazilian tax authorities (SEFAZ).
Streamlined Processes: Manual data entry for invoices is significantly reduced, saving time and resources.
Improved Accuracy: Automating invoice creation reduces the risk of errors associated with manual data entry.
Secure Communication: Secure and certified communication with SEFAZ is facilitated through the solution.
Efficiency Gains: Faster invoice processing translates to quicker settlements and improved cash flow.
Important Note: Upcoming End of Maintenance"

It's important to be aware that SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica (SAP NFE) is an on-premise solution nearing its end-of-maintenance date (December 31, 2025). SAP recommends exploring alternative solutions to ensure continued compliance with evolving NF-e regulations.

entry.title: Re: Unable to find the option Write a blog
entry.content: To write a blog in the SAP Community, you need to follow a few specific steps. Firstly, you must complete the "Tour the SAP Community" tutorial. For more detailed instructions and to start the process, you can visit the following link. https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/community-2024.html

entry.title: Re: Looking to create a condition in the contract request...
entry.content:
Hi Justin,

The downstream contract request approval flow cannot be conditionalized based on the workspace amendment type field.

I would suggest you to check with our consulting team for your business requirements.

https://me.sap.com/notes/KB0394723


Regards,

Basavant

entry.title: Re: Anatomy of a Function Module: POPUP_TO_CONFIRM – Part 4
entry.content:
@david_reza 

Thanks for your comment.
You’re right. I need to update the parts with links on top.

entry.title: Re: Multiple batches for finished good boxes in a single...
entry.content:
Hi Kailas,

thanks for the clarification that helps.

From what I gather you basically want to post CO11N using a scanner and the label you are scanning is pre-printed upon release of the production order.

You actually only want one batch for your finished goods stock if possible, but you need a unique number for each box for the warehousing process (in your case storage unit). That's why you consider a batch number for each box coming out of production.

Correct? (Just to make sure my answer goes in the right direction)

Regards

Andreas

entry.title: Re: Billing and Shipping Address in SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear @deepanvip  as per your requirement follow the below mentioned steps. 

Step-by-Step Guide:

  1. Create an A/P Invoice:

    • Navigate to Purchasing - A/P > A/P Invoice.

  2. Enter Vendor Details:

    • Fill in the vendor information.

  3. Select the Billing Address:

    • In the Logistics tab, choose the correct billing address which includes the relevant GST number. This address will be used to calculate the tax.

  4. Select the Ship-To Address:

    • In the same Logistics tab, select the ship-to address where the materials will be delivered and accounted for. This address can have a different GST number.

  5. Add Items:

    • Go to the Contents tab.
    • Enter the items and quantities for the invoice.

  6. Review and Apply Tax:

    • Ensure the tax is calculated based on the GST number of the billing address.
    • Double-check that all items are being accounted for in the ship-to location.

  7. Save the A/P Invoice:

    • Review all entered information.
    • Click Add to save the invoice.

Important Points:

  • GST Configuration:

    • Ensure both locations' GST numbers are correctly set up in the system.

  • Tax Codes:

    • Verify tax codes for accuracy to ensure correct tax calculation based on the billing address.

This approach ensures the tax is calculated based on the billing address, while the materials are accounted for at the ship-to location.

entry.title: Re: SAP REPORT QUERY
entry.content:
Dear @KULBEERSINGH as per your requirement.

SELECT
T0.DocNum AS [Sales Order No.],
T0.DocDate AS [Sales Order Date],
T0.CardCode AS [Customer Code],
T1.CardName AS [Customer Name],
T2.DocNum AS [AR Invoice No.],
T2.DocDate AS [AR Invoice Date],
DATEDIFF(day, T0.DocDate, T2.DocDate) AS [Gap Days]
FROM
ORDR T0
LEFT JOIN
OCRD T1 ON T0.CardCode = T1.CardCode
LEFT JOIN
OINV T2 ON T0.DocEntry = T2.BaseEntry AND T2.ObjType = 13
WHERE
T0.DocStatus = 'C' -- 'C' means Closed (fully delivered and invoiced)
ORDER BY
T0.DocNum;
 

 

Regards,
Faraz Maqsud

entry.title: Re: Analysis of integration requirements for Advanced Fin...
entry.content:
Hi, please check online help of AFC https://help.sap.com/docs/advanced-financial-closing/administration/connectivity?locale=en-US and select the system you have. For SAP ERP systems it is a REST service and for SAP S/4HANA systems it is a ODATA service.

For certificates please see the Cloud Trust Center and select SAP BTP. As SAP AFC is running on top of SAP BTP you will find the relevant certificates under SAP BTP.

Regards

Thomas

Initial rejection with comment and decision note...

after re-submission, it was approved.

the Decision note and Comment provided by an approver can be retrieved from below tables...

Sincerely,

Pardha Reddy.C

entry.title: Re: Why do PowerDesigner XML files contain non-ASCII char...
entry.content:
Hi George,

your model seems to be called LDM_DATA_MODEL_BIN. Are you sure you haven`t saved it in binary format? That would be pretty good explanation for binary characters presence in the model...

If binary characters are present even in the XML format of the model, that would indeed be quite strange. The only scenario I can think of is manual insertion (copy-paste) directly into the file, meaning neither using the PD GUI nor the PD API.

Regards,

Ondrej Divis

entry.title: How can I restrict the V2oDataModel automatic MERGE call on cell value change in SAPUI5 grid table?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am using V2 ODataModel(sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataModel) for performing list binding to a grid table(sap.ui.table.Table) in my SAPUI5 application.

There are a few editable columns in the grid table. When I try to change any value in the editable column cell, it automatically triggers oData MERGE call.

Editable fields in Grid table:

Immediate oData MERGE call:

Is there any way to stop this automatic MERGE call? And I also want to store the modified data(which is working) of editable cells in v2 oDataModel which is required to send the modified entries data to the S4HANA.

entry.title: Re: Store attachments from Standard Fiori apps in Archive...
entry.content:
Dear,

1st of all it is important to understand that ArchiveLink technology is being replaced by DMS in the Fiori Apps.

HDM - Harmonized document management - is the global term on top of the DMS and KPro technologies.

ArchiveLink attachments can in some cases still be displayed in some Fiori Apps, but not in all cases, and such attachments are not supposed to be created anymore in S/4.

SAP is in a kind of transition phase where, when you add attachments, for some Fiori Apps they are still stored as GOS (KPro), and for some others as DMS.

The use of DMS allows to have distinct document types for different attachments when needed, as it was possible in ArchiveLink.

So in practice there is very often a "discrepancy" between what you can see in usual SAPGUI/WebGUI (= Fioritized) transactions (usually ArchiveLink and GOS/Kpro) and what you can see in Fiori Apps (usually GOS/KPro and DMS).

For cases where there is a business need to use both WebGUI (as Fioritized) and Fiori Apps, and there are such cases, then the only option is to put in place an attachment-link-sync applications that ensures that attachments are made visible in all different types of UI. 

You may either try to develop such an application -not always obvious- or use the one on the market, YAC by ZNK.

entry.title: Bin Structure and Template
entry.content:
I trying to create Bin structure and template but ending up in error like "Storage bin must not begin with a blank character" or template not correct.

I have the below Storage Type with  bins  Aisle is 01, Stack is A1 and A,B,C are bin level

01A1A
01A1B
01A1C
01B1A
01B1B
01B1C

01C1C

01D1B

02A1B
02A1C

02C1C
02D1A
02D1B
02D1C
02E1A
02E1B
02E1C
02G1A
02G1B
02G1C

Could you please help me in Bin structure and Template.

Regards,

Chand Basha.S

entry.title: SAP Gateway Error Log in Fiori apps Run Settlement - Actual
entry.content:
Hello,

I encounter an issue where there is no Processing Type in the Run Settlement - Actual when pressing the button "Run"/"Test Run". 

It should show like below:

 

I have go through the Troubleshoot RAP since the apps is using RAP and by using the ADT feed reader, I managed to get the Gateway Error Log: Entity 'C_RUNSETTLMTACTLPROCESSINGTYPE': Parameter entity set 'C_RunSettlmtActlProcessingType' cannot be used for read. However, I have no idea how to solve the issue as the CDS view C_RUNSETTLMTACTLPROCESSINGTYPE is a custom entity and use an ABAP class for the data retrieval. Upon debugging, the class is not triggered and I stuck on how to solve this. How should I solve this? Thank you.

SAP BTP, ABAP environment ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: Menu bar not showing properly #60930
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
We are experiencing an issue in SAP where the menu text appears in white font color, making it invisible. We attempted to resolve this by changing the skin style from Belize Deep to Fiori, but this resulted in a change to the home page color.
 
I have checked the User Master and found that no default user is mapped. To verify, I compared the settings for the client and noticed that the User Master Display Skin Style is blank, whereas in my case, it is set to Belize Deep.
 
I tried clicking on "Restore Default" and updated the settings, but after refreshing the page, the same settings reappear.
 
Could you please advise on what might be causing this issue and how we can resolve it?
 
 
Regards,
Shubham Bulley

When choosing a customer account or multiple ones it work fine also when running it in background it work and generate the result in the spool of the job.

secstore ok

authorizations of the user ok

all rfc checked

any help please

entry.title: Katowice - SAP Stammtisch 21.08.2024
entry.content:
The local SAP Community in Katowice will meet soon again!

 

SAP Stammtisch in Katowice will happen on August 21st, 2024 at 6 PM CET, so join us and be a part of our Group!

Let’s talk about what's new in the SAP world, about interesting SAP projects in the region, and what's new with ourselves.

Please note that the location has been changed to a summer bar by the pond in the Dolina Trzech Stawów! This time we will meet at Woda Beach bar. There is a spacious and free parking lot nearby, suitable for those arriving by car.

Please let us know if you will participate in SAP Stammtisch by clicking "I will attend" - if you do that, I believe, this will encourage others to come too!

Find more information in the blog posts board: ...

and we also invite you to join the Katowice Group if you are not a member yet: SAP Community Katowice

entry.title: How to Concatenate one field based on another one field in Webi report
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement in Webi Report.

I am sharing the png screenshot (as Excel is allowed to share here) and explaining further details below:

I need to concatenate field named "SPA_ID"(green color column) as per Doc_No(orange color column).

Basically, I need a new column Concat_SPA_ID that u see in blue colour.

I have manually entered values for "Concat_SPA_ID" field (Blue color) only till row number 14, to show u exactly what is required.

I tried the variable below, but not helpful:
=[SPA_ID] + "," + Previous(Self;([DOC_NO]))

It would be of great help if u can help me achieve this blue colored field "Concat_SPA_ID"🙏.


Plese let me know if any more details required.

Regards,
Shilpi

entry.title: Re: Equipment Card Search
entry.content:
Hello @abb27 ,

You can disable the description from the form settings, against item code, uncheck the description, then it will show the item code, instead of item name.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Abap : Loop at bapi function module not working
entry.content:
Hi again

I have no idea what you are trying to get with you code? But if i should do it i would do it like this (except it makes no sence to print multiple POs like this):

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Report ZJSP_TEST_IO
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
REPORT zjsp_test_io.

TABLES : ekko.
DATA: lo_msg_handler     TYPE REF TO cl_message_handler_mm.
DATA :
  lt_po_details TYPE TABLE OF bapiekbes,
  ls_po_details TYPE bapiekbes,
  lt_items      TYPE bapimepoitem_tp,
  t_return      TYPE TABLE OF bapiret2,
  w_return      LIKE bapiret2.

DATA counter TYPE i.
SELECT-OPTIONS:
po_no FOR ekko-ebeln NO INTERVALS.

START-OF-SELECTION .

  SELECT * FROM ekko
    INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_ekko)
    WHERE ebeln IN @PO_no
    AND   bstyp EQ 'F'.


  LOOP AT lt_ekko INTO DATA(ls_ekko).
    CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_PO_GETDETAIL1'
      EXPORTING
        purchaseorder    = ls_ekko-ebeln
      TABLES
        poitem           = lt_items
        pohistory_totals = lt_po_details
        return           = t_return.

    cl_demo_output=>display( lt_items ).
    cl_demo_output=>display( lt_po_details ).


  ENDLOOP.


Also: be aware that pohistory_totals will only contain data if there acually is any (Goods Receipts or likely). A brand new PO would have nothing in this table...

entry.title: Re: Indicator for Integrated Planning
entry.content: Dear Marcio, thanks for your reply. I see that we use ECP will not allow to use integrated planning.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere News in June
entry.content:
SAPPHIRE is in the books now, and we did not stop to deliver great 📢 new features in SAP Datasphere. Feel free to watch SAPPHIRE session replays on-demand on the virtual event platform.

There are also lots of excellent new blogs in the community, a new bite sized video series about the data marketplace, and new Customer Engagement Initiative for SAP Datasphere where you can participate.

My top features in June

Column level lineage

The impact and lineage analysis is now enabled to get one level deeper and allows you to select one or more columns in your analyzed object and show their sources and the columns that they impact. More information.

 

Many improvements in the data integration area

There are multiple improvements in the data integration and monitoring area.

Transformation Flows
You can now add a view as well as open SQL schema objects as a source in a transformation flow. More information.

Task Chains
You can now include Open SQL procedures within task chains (more information). As a prerequisite an administrator must grant EXECUTE privileges for objects in the Open SQL schema space. More information.

Replication Flows
You can now add objects to a replication flow in status Active without having to stop the run first. More information. Moreover, you can now specify a thread count greater than 1 in replication flows for delta load and thus enable parallel processing. More information.

Monitoring
Multiple improvements also in the data integration monitoring, where you can now also see local tables which have been created in a space and check the metrics related to these tables. More information. 
The status text descriptions in the replication flow monitoring was rephrased so that they are more self-explanatory. They now differentiate more clearly between the situation at flow level and at object level. More information.
And last but not least the details screen in the Views monitor now indicates if your view data is protected by a data access control. More information.

 

 

Data Marketplace Video Series

There is an excellent video series 🎥 created by my colleague @FlorianN describing and showing all facets of the SAP Datasphere data marketplace 🛒 in a few minutes. Use them to learn more about the data marketplace in general and the different components it consists of.
👉New video series for SAP Datasphere data marketplace

 

SAP Customer Engagement Initiative

The second cycle of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative in 2024 has officially kicked off in June, bringing with it 51 new projects to fuel innovation and collaboration. As part of that initiative, you can now signup for the ➡️ User Validation for new SAP Datasphere homepage until July 11th 2024. You will find all details on the project page and also register yourself there for participation.
👉Check out the other projects.

 

My top blogs in June

My favorite blog in June is highlighting the newly introduced validation framework in SAP Datasphere. The first checks provide initial validation rules to check the consistency of your view key columns and hierarchy nodes and provide detailed output about the erroneous records. @senthurshree describes the framework and its current test very well in her blog with more validations to come in the next quarters
➡️ SAP Datasphere Data Validations

The next blog I would like to highlight is also about authorizations from SAP S/4HANA written by @JensBraun 
➡️ Integrate SAP S/4HANA authorizations into SAP Datasphere

A very nice blog is covering @Wolfgang_Eptings blog about the role of Data Products with
➡️ 10+ ways to reshape your SAP landscape with SAP Business Technology Platform – Blog 8

My last blog highlight of June written by @heiko_schneider about new DAC types
➡️ Introducing new type of Data Access Control "Operator and Value" for SAP Datasphere

 

More blogs to check out 👇

  • Importance of Currency Conversion in SAP Datasphere
  • SAP Datasphere: Replicating Custom CDS Views from S4 HANA to Azure Data Lake with CDC
  • SAP Datasphere Data Validations
  • SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge learning journey
  • SAP Datasphere - BW ODP Delta
  • New certification available! SAP Data Engineer - Data Fabric for SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere
  • Setting up Trial SAP Datasphere Account with Trial SAP SAC Live Connection
  • Datasphere - Replication Flow : Enabling the ABAP CDS Extractor
  • Three Real-World Stories: Modernizing SAP Business Warehouse to the Cloud
  • GitHub sample for working with SAP Datasphere and SAP Data Quality Management, microservices
  • Create Data Products with SAP Datasphere Marketplace
  • Data Access Control in SAP Datasphere - Hierarchy DAC
  • What's New in Q2 2024 for the Release Navigator for SAP BTP
  • New video series for SAP Datasphere data marketplace
  • Introducing new type of Data Access Control "Operator and Value" for SAP Datasphere
  • Shape the Future of SAP Solutions: Join the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative 2024 Cycle 2
  • SAP Schulungskonferenzen: Expertenwissen aus erster Hand!
  • New Release of SAP Data and Analytics Advisory Methodology
  • New SAP Analytics Cloud Performance Workshop
  • 10+ ways to reshape your SAP landscape with SAP Business Technology Platform – Blog 8
  • Trouble Accessing Data Builder and Business Builder in SAP Datasphere Free Trial
  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy Newsletter June 2024
  • Get Ready for a Data and AI Revolution: What's Hot at SAP SAPPHIRE 2024 - My personal picks!
  • Unlock the full potential of SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere
  • Integrate SAP S/4HANA authorizations into SAP Datasphere

Find more information and related blog posts on the topic page for SAP Datasphere. You will find further product information on our Community with various subpages about Getting Started, Business Content, the SAP BW Bridge as well as content for Best Practices & Troubleshooting and the FAQ for SAP Datasphere.

Find out how to unleash the power of your business data with SAP’s free learning content on SAP Datasphere. It’s designed to help you enrich your data projects, simplify the data landscape, and make the most out of your investment. Check out even more role-based learning resources and opportunities to get certified in one place on  SAP Learning site.

entry.title: Input field not being highlighted on error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm using CAP Node.js(odata v4) and for frontend I have used a list report & object page template with fiori elements. The issue is that when i throw an error on invalid user input, the input field on the object page isn't  being highlighted. It does throw the error successfully but for some reason doesn't highlight the target. I have used the following code in the before(Create) handler : 

 if(req.data.name === null || req.data.name === ''){
            req.error({
                message: 'Name cannot be empty',
                target: 'name',
                status: 422
            })

        }

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – How and Why to Upgrade SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA 2023 or Higher
entry.content: Great!!! Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Re: Architecting Complex Real-Time Business Solutions: SAP BPA with dynamic Multi level Approval
entry.content:
Thanks Adwait and Mohit for the excellent blog.

Regarding maintaining DOA in decision tables: Business users generally prefer to maintain DOA directly in Production. With decision tables, users have to maintain them in DEV and transport to QA and PROD, and DOA may not be the same in all three environments. There is also a dependency on the IT team to deploy this in Production for any approval matrix changes.

Could you please provide your comments on this scenario?

entry.title: key field is not enough in custom CDS view
entry.content:
What will happen if key field is not enough in custom CDS view, in other words,  if we just use key fields are taken from primary data source, don't add additional key fields, and  there are multiple rows that have the same key in preview of a custom CDS view, including CDS view, external API,etc.

We must define multiple keys in a custom CDS view to ensure unique identification  to every record?

entry.title: Re: Successfactors Time Management – new features in 1H 2023 release

Great Blog

Is it possible to place images in Timesheet instructions? Is it mandatory to be an image that is on the internet and not an image that the client sends us?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Protecting staticfile based apps
entry.content: Did you find any answer?

entry.title: Re: How can I restrict the V2oDataModel automatic MERGE c...
entry.content:
setDeferredGroups

setChangeGroups

 

did you use that api?if yes, you have to use them correctly

entry.title: Re: key field is not enough in custom CDS view
entry.content:
of course, you have to specify the key correctly to make the record unique.

cds  view preivew won't complain if the key is not unique, but the odata service will if I am not wrong.

entry.title: Re: How WBS element alphanumeric number is picked while c...
entry.content: The best way to control the WBS naming convention is with the Coding Mask defined in configuration.

Thanks in advance,

Simon.

entry.title: Consumption of custom forms in external systems from SAP Sales Cloud
entry.content:
Have tried exposing your custom output forms created in SAP C4C Cloud application studio to the external systems. We all used the Standard Sales Quote output forms which can be exposed to the other systems easily via the ODATA APIs of SAP Cloud for Customer. The response for those API calls would be binary data (Base 64 encoded) and can be converted to readable format.

Let’s see how this custom output form had been created in the solution. The custom output form is created against the custom BO which had been associated with the Customer Quote Business object.

We followed the usual routine to create the custom forms as mentioned in many of the SAP SCN forums and custom action ABSL files to generate the values for the output form.

We have a requirement to expose the custom output form created in the solution to the external system. The custom forms are generated anytime by clicking on the custom button embedded into the standard attachment tab.

High level steps to complete this requirement.

  1. Custom BO with required elements and association
  2. Delete all the existing instances and generate the new PDF binary.
  3. The new generation of PDF binary can be achieved via the POST method which return the binary pdf data directly in the response.
  4. Retrieve the OutputRequestFormTemplateCode dynamically based on the solution prefix.
  5. Invoke the GetPDF(BusinessObjectNode, FormTemplateCode, FormTemplateLanguageCode) method of OutputManagementUtilities and assign to the instance pdfBinary.
  6. Create custom ODATA for the custom BO generated in step 1.
  7. Exposing the API URL of the custom ODATA to the external system with the technical user id we can generate the POST method successfully.

PFB the code snippet.

 

Custom BO: ZFormOutput  //BODL defintion
element  quoteID: BusinessTransactionDocumentID
element pdfBinary: BinaryObject
association toSlsQuote: CustomerQuote

 

Actual Logic

In After-Modify event we will delete all the existing output instance as per the quote ID. Then we will create the new PDF binary instance by calling custom action ABSL which is used to generate the output form.

 

foreach (var instance in this)
{
	//Delete existing instance(s) for quote id
	var query = ZFormOutput.QueryByElements;
	var selPara = query.CreateSelectionParams();
	selPara.Add(query.quoteId.content, "I", "EQ", instance.quoteId.content);
	var oldInstanceList = query.ExecuteFromDB(selPara);
	foreach (var oldInstance in oldInstanceList)
	{
		oldInstance.Delete();
	}

	//Create PDF binary for new instance
	var quoteInfo =<CustomBusinessObject>.Retrieve(instance.quoteId);
	quoteInfo.<customActionABSL>(); Used to generate the custom output form
	var ftCode : OutputRequestFormTemplateCode;
	var sn_type = quoteInfo.GetObjectNodeReference().ObjectTypeCode.content.Substring(1,8);
            ftCode.content = sn_type + "_XXXX1";

	instance.pdfBinary = OutputManagementUtilities.GetPDF(quoteInfo, ftCode, "E");
}

 

ODATA reference and testing in postman tool.

 

I hope this article will helps you to expose the custom forms from SAP Sales Cloud to external system.
Thanks,

GKS.

entry.title: Re: Translation of message class in ABAP Cloud Environment

entry.title: Custom fields in MIRO Enhancement with BAdI mrm_item_custfields not appearing
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Using mrm_item_custfields for implementing the custom tab in MIRO item level. 

I followed the below thread to implement the custom tab in the MIRO item level except I left or not done the append fields to RSEG table. Remaining of all the steps provided in the link are covered. 

http://tyruan.blogspot.com/2013/09/to-enhance-standard-miro-detail-screen.html

Other than my screen inputs all other values are appearing (in t_drseg_custom TYPE tdrseg_cust ). I can see my fields are there in the debugging screen but values are not passed. 

Please help me  where did I miss and how to fix this? Many thanks. 

Note:

The reason I left the RSEG part , I have a different requirement where I have to use the Fiori custom fields, which are already created in RSEG, that are to used to for saving the values. A different thread (Q&A) has been posted and waiting for response/answers.

Tried with other Q&A post, discussions but no helps/response.

Please response and much appreciated for providing your answers here.

Thanks.

entry.title: Unable to find node Define SCB Indicator in SAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

In ECC we have below path for to Define SCB Indicators but when I have checked in SAP Hana Cloud I did not see any node relating to this. We are able to see more than 400 SCB Indicators list in Supplier Line Items but we are unable to find where it is defined, please provide solution for this.

Financial Accounting>Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable>Business Transactions>Incoming Invoices/Credit Memos>Define SCB Indicator for Foreign Trade Regulations

 

Thanks

Naveen Kumar

entry.title: Re: Kernel upgrade(PAS - Windows and HANA DB Linux)
entry.content:
The kernel upgrade is done only on the PAS running on the Windows. You just need to download the latest SAPEXE.SAR and the SAPEXEDB.SAR from SAP , and unpack them over the the existing ones (example: D:\usr\sap\<SID>\SYS\exe\uc\NTADM64\)

Please look into SAP note 19466 - Downloading SAP kernel patches

entry.title: Re: How can I restrict the V2oDataModel automatic MERGE c...
entry.content: like i said, how you used it? did you use batch?

entry.title: Re: Why do PowerDesigner XML files contain non-ASCII char...
entry.content: Thanks, Ondrej. Now why didn't I think of that? The original model is 12 years old - I must have been experimenting with performance at the time. Anyway, I resolved it by doing Save|As into the same file name in xml format instead of binary.

entry.title: Re: Why do PowerDesigner XML files contain non-ASCII char...
entry.content: That line now reads - signature="LDM_DATA_MODEL_XML" version="16.7.7.7583"?>

entry.title: New organization structure, cost centers and profit centers hierarchy change - ERP ECC 6
entry.content:
Hi,

I require urgent assistance. Client is restructuring and wants to create a new profit center and cost center hierarchies where the new centers are to be assigned to. 

The old profit and cost centers are to be locked and the new activated under this structure. Balances from 1 April (beg. of their financial year) to date are to be transferred in to these new centers, i.e. Balance Sheet, PnL, Opex, Revenues etc. 

Working on ERP ECC6 without the reorganization tool. 

Please assist as to how i go about this project as it starts this monday.

How do I replace the cost and profit center standard hierarchies so that upon mass creation of the centers, I can correctly allocate them to the new hierachies without viewing all the old groups etc.

How do I correctly migrate all the financial data to the new profit centers.

Any advice will help. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Migration of Leased Assets
entry.content:
Hi Jeroen, Many thanks for your input, I have a question regarding the migration of Leased Assets and Lease Contract creation 

let's assume from your example mentioned Golive Jan 2024, 

When migrating leased Assets, you must migrate the Acquisition cost and Cumulative values i.e Net book Value as of 01.01.2024.

upon creating the lease contract as of 01.01.2024

The system will post the remaining ROU from 01.01.2024  to the migrated asset, which is incorrect.

Any suggestions help. 

Many thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Data Management and Analytics empowered by SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content: Too lengthy blog to understand. I am sure this must be a very useful or informative blog. But i wonder how could you have such a patience and time to write such a lengthy content.

entry.title: How to report the 'Test Result Attributes, ‘Expected Result’ and ‘Actual Result’ in Test Suite?
entry.content:
Test result attributes field is not found in any test analytics report or test suite dashboard. Is there any workaround to report it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to report the 'Test Result Attributes, ‘Expected...
entry.content:
It is a known limitation to report and filter on test result attributes and that this is currently only part of the Test Report. See below:

  1. When generating the test report, please choose "SAP_FB_TEST_REPORT" (SAP Focused Build template for test report) in the Document Template. To use this option, ‘Test Result Attributes’, ‘Expected Result’ and ‘Actual Result’ can be shown in the test report. 
  2.  ‘Expected Result’ and ‘Actual Result’ of Test Steps test cases can be reported in the Test Suite Dashboard -> Test Steps Progress Monitor.  But we could never report on ‘Test Result Attributes’ here.
  3. With ST-OST SP13, it is possible to add own custom columns in the Test Suite Dashboard. The customer could add additional columns for single ‘Test Result Attributes’ if required. Refer to the following:

What's New in Focused Build 2.0 SP 13 | SAP Help Portal

-> Test Suite Dashboard

New Customizing Activity: Define Custom Fields for Analytical List Pages

entry.title: Looking for an S4 Odata V2 contains below Shipment fileds post Invoicing
entry.content:
I am looking for a standard Odata caters below fileds for OData  SAP Transportation Management #implimentation and API call. Is there any standard API available which I can ut

 

Delivery Order No
Shipment No
Transport Planning Point
Shipment Route
Shipping Type (etc truck, air…)
Container ID
External ID 1
Forwarding Agent
Transporter Name
Search Terms 1
Search Terms 2
Street / House Number
Street 4
Postal Code
City
Country
Region
Timezone
Language
Telephone
Email

 

 

 

 

s4Hana Onpermise

Odata V2

 

Regards

Jakku

entry.title: How to attach multiple UUID numbers or original invoice number to CN/DN for DRC Malaysia e-Invoice?
entry.content:
Solution by SAP DRC is to insert the original invoice document number during the CN/DN creation in certain field depending on the generation of the CN/DN.

Meaning, if CN/DN posted from FI (FB75 or FB65), we have to insert the invoice number in the Header Text field. If it is posted from SD billing (VF01), the original number to insert in the Reference field. If posted from MM (MIRO), number to insert in the Header Text field.

Or we can insert the UUID number of the original invoice into the CN/DN edocument in edocument cockpit.

Please note that this is the solution provided by DRC for Malaysia e-Invoicing.

Creating and Submitting Electronic Customer Invoices to the Tax Authorities | SAP Help Portal

However, due to the limitation of characters for the fields suggested, we can only attached one original invoice number to CN/DN.

My question is how to attach multiple original invoice numbers or UUID number to one CN/DN before submission to IRBM?

entry.title: Re: Hiding Story Filters or Excluding Dimension Members v...
entry.content:
Hi RajuRao， 

  It's not possible to hide a specific dimension from story filter bar, but you can do following to hide the entire story filter panel from story viewer: 

  1. Set story filter panel to hidden from story filter: story setting -> view time setting -> filter panel 
  2. Hide story filter button in toolbar: story setting -> view time setting -> toolbar -> view -> remove filter icon. 

  And yes, you can set exclude member via script, but likely you need to do multiple types for different widgets or pages. 

https://d.dam.sap.com/a/3Y16uka/DeveloperHandbookSACAnalyticsDesigner.pdf

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors ONB Custom Task JSON Codat sample

entry.title: Re: GRC Tuesdays: Announcing SAP’s plans for a next generation Governance, Risk, and Compliance Plat
entry.content:
Hi @PaulinaG, 

As mentioned in the post, the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative for SAP GRC version 2026 is now open, with its registration closing on July 11th 2024, with the aim to gather requirements and use cases, identify existing pain points, validate our concepts and plans and prioritize potential features / processes.

I would suggest joining it.

Kind regards, 

Thomas

entry.title: OKX-Empfehlungscode: OK1903 – OKX-Einladungscode 2024
entry.content:
OKX definiert den Empfehlungscode als einen speziellen Code, den neue Benutzer bei der Registrierung auf der Plattform verwenden können. Dank des Empfehlungscodes "OK1903“ können neue Mitglieder bei der Kontoerstellung Transaktionen mit dem erfassten Provisionssatz tätigen.

OKX-Einladungscode: OK1903

Derzeit wird der OKX-Einladungscode als "OK1903“ verwendet. Es handelt sich um den OKX-Einladungscode, der weltweit am häufigsten verwendet wird, während seiner gesamten Lebensdauer gültig ist und die meisten Rabattprodukte bietet.


Geben Sie beim Erstellen eines OKX-Kontos das Passwort OK1903 ein, wo "Einladungscode“ steht (optional). Der Provisionsrabatt, den Sie erhalten, beträgt 30 %. Darüber hinaus können Sie einen Registrierungsbonus von 1200 USDT erhalten, indem Sie Transaktionen im Raum durchführen.

entry.title: Code de parrainage OKX : OK1903 - Code d'invitation OKX 2024
entry.content:
OKX définit le code de parrainage comme un code spécial que les nouveaux utilisateurs peuvent utiliser lors de leur inscription sur la plateforme. Grâce au code de parrainage « OK1903 », les nouveaux membres peuvent effectuer des transactions avec le taux de commission enregistré lors de la création d'un compte.

Code d'invitation OKX : OK1903

Actuellement, le code d'invitation OKX est utilisé comme « OK1903 ». Il s'agit du code d'invitation OKX, le plus utilisé au monde, valable toute sa durée de vie et qui propose les produits les plus réduits.


Lors de la création d'un compte OKX, entrez le mot de passe OK1903 là où il est indiqué « code d'invitation » (facultatif). La remise sur commission que vous bénéficierez est de 30 %. De plus, vous pouvez obtenir un bonus d'inscription de 1 200 USDT en effectuant des transactions dans la salle.

entry.title: Temu İndirim Kuponu: acs646908 - Temu Kupon Kodu 2024
entry.content:
Temu İndirim Kodu Nedir?

Temu indirim kodu, sepetinizi oluşturduktan sonra ekleyebileceğiniz %30 indirim sağlayan “acs646908” kodudur. Yalnızca yeni uygulama kullanıcıları %30 indirimden faydalanabilmektedir.

Temu üyelik kodu nedir?

Temu Üyelik Kodu: https://temu.to/m/u9fu1v7mn0z bu bağlantıdan kayıt olduğunuzda 100$ kupon paketi alırsınız ve yapacağınız alışverişte "acs646908" kodunu girerek sepet tutarından %30 indirim uygulanacaktır

entry.title: Re: Exercise in Learning Journey Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP causes endless requests
entry.content: Has no one a suggestion? It's really easy to replicate. Just check out the branch, start the app and create a new risk.

entry.title: Re: Multiple batches for finished good boxes in a single...
entry.content:
Hi Kailas,

ok, that clarifies the requirements.

Your challenge is that CO11N only does the MM stock posting which results in a quant in storage type 901 in WM. Only when you create the WM transfer order for that quant the SU is coming into play.

I think you could investigate further in the following idea:

  • Assuming that the quantity in a box coming out of production is the same for each box you can define a default quantity per storage unit type in material master (WM view 2)
  • That default quantity determines how many storage units are required for putting away the quantity in your production order ... and therefore the number of labels you would want to pre-print
  • Upon release of the production order you can (a) calculate the number of labels / SUs needed, (b) "pull" the next numbers from the SU number range interval you want to use and (c) trigger the print out.
  • You need to find a user exit or BAdI for (a) to (c) because that is not SAP standard (usually the print programs have that feature; or you can define your own program)
  • And you need to find a way to transfer the data in the barcode of your label to CO11N. I would assume separate Z-transaction with only the relevant fields for the shopfloor personel will do the magic (production order, quantity in box, SU number - although that's only needed later for the WM process)

I hope that helps.

Best regards Andreas

entry.title: Fiori Elements. Variant Management different when running from URL vs running from Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi gurus, 

I'm facing an issue that is driving me crazy. Have developed an analytical App using Fiori Elements, and set SmartVariant = false in the manifest.json, as I want different variant management options for filter and result sections.

So, when I run the application using the URL (Or by executing index.hmtl in SE80), everything looks fine and I see the separated variant management options:

However, when I execute the tile from the Launchpad, there is only one:

I have no idea what is causing this. Do you have any clue?

Thanks a lot!
